steps.title: Define variables and set up the system
steps.content:
Let $a$ = number of adults and $c$ = number of children.

From the problem constraints:
  • Total people in the group: $a + c = 21$
  • Total revenue: $80a + 60c = 1440$

From the first equation: $a = 21 - c$

steps.title: Use substitution to solve for c
steps.content:
Substitute $a = 21 - c$ into the revenue equation:
$$80(21 - c) + 60c = 1440$$
Expand and simplify:
$$1680 - 80c + 60c = 1440$$
$$1680 - 20c = 1440$$
$$-20c = -240$$
$$c = 12$$
The group has 12 children. That matches choice C — C is correct.
